description_long: This is a modern multi-unit residential house complex featuring a flat roof and clean, rectilinear lines. The facade is composed of large glass windows, wood paneling, and light-colored concrete or stucco, giving it a contemporary appearance. The building is elevated on stilts or columns, creating an open ground level that may serve as parking or communal space. Each unit has private balconies or terraces with glass railings, and landscaped greenery is integrated into the design, both at ground level and on the upper terraces. The structure is set back from a wide street or driveway, with a clear separation between the public road and private living spaces. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, multi-unit house complex with flat roofs, large glass windows, wood accents, and private balconies, elevated above open ground-level space. The design features clean lines, integrated greenery, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, balconies, and the open ground level supported by columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, staggered terraces, and landscaped private yards behind the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional balconies, glass doors, and more greenery integrated into the back of the complex.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's depth, flat roof, and the continuation of the driveway or street along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryways with glass doors, minimal steps, and integrated planters; no prominent porch or columns.
